title: 宝塚記念の後に・キーワード②

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I beat you, you beat me not! I beat you, you beat
me not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship bests Tosen Jordan with the haughty
triumph of a child on the playground! She also
gets a new clue, so that's nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They promise to have a rematch on a big stage
next time. Meanwhile, the organizer of the search
for Eden and the clues remains unknown.
